name: Wellspring
descriptionSeed: A tidal city where nobody feels anything privately. Grief is conducted in public halls; joy is conducted in public halls; the architecture is SHAPED for feeling and it amplifies it deliberately. Visitors either weep within a day or flee within a day, and the Threnodists consider both responses entirely healthy and neither of them embarrassing.
encounterFlavor: Threnodists who will ask you what you are actually feeling and will not accept 'fine'; a public grieving in full flood; someone who has held something in for years and is about to not.
questSeeds: Someone has come to Wellspring specifically to feel something for the first time, and it may kill them
A Syllogist envoy is here and is being slowly, kindly destroyed
